summary: Fleet GPS Page Visual Redesign - Frontend-only testing complete. All premium Wialon/Uber/Blacklane dispatch style features verified. Glassmorphic floating panels, IBM Plex fonts, Bento grid telemetry, minimal dot markers with pulse animations, pill-shaped filters - all working correctly. Functionality identical to before redesign.

frontend_tests.gps_page_loads_dark_theme: PASS - Page loads at /fleet/geolocation with dark theme (#09090B background)
frontend_tests.leaflet_map_full_screen: PASS - Full-screen Leaflet map with CartoDB dark tiles
frontend_tests.glassmorphic_sidebar: PASS - Left floating sidebar with bg-zinc-950/65 backdrop-blur-2xl
frontend_tests.vehicle_card_opens_detail: PASS - Clicking vehicle card opens right detail panel
frontend_tests.detail_panel_status: PASS - Shows 'EN MOUVEMENT' with green indicator
frontend_tests.detail_panel_speed: PASS - Shows '55 km/h' in Bento grid
frontend_tests.detail_panel_heading: PASS - Shows '210 deg' with navigation arrow
frontend_tests.map_zooms_to_selected: PASS - Map flies to selected vehicle
frontend_tests.mobile_bottom_sheet: PASS - Mobile view shows bottom sheet
frontend_tests.mobile_sidebar_hidden: PASS - Desktop sidebar hidden on mobile
frontend_tests.mobile_detail_overlay: PASS - Full-screen detail overlay on mobile
frontend_tests.pill_filter_buttons: PASS - Filter buttons have rounded-full class
frontend_tests.manrope_font_headings: PASS - Manrope font loaded for headings
frontend_tests.ibm_plex_mono_telemetry: PASS - font-mono class on telemetry values
frontend_tests.refresh_button: PASS - Refresh button present and functional
frontend_tests.geolocation_nav_highlighted: PASS - Geolocalisation link highlighted in sidebar

verified_design_elements.bento_grid: 2x2 grid for telemetry stats (speed, heading, satellites, ignition)
verified_design_elements.markers: Minimal dot markers with pulse animation for moving vehicles

critical_code_review_comments: Excellent implementation of premium Wialon/Uber-style design
Proper use of data-testid attributes on all interactive elements
Glassmorphic panels correctly positioned with z-index above Leaflet layers
Mobile responsive design with bottom sheet pattern
Bento grid telemetry display is clean and readable
Status indicators with pulse animations for moving vehicles
All functionality preserved from previous iteration
context_for_next_testing_agent: Fleet GPS page visual redesign complete and verified. Premium Wialon/Uber/Blacklane dispatch style implemented with glassmorphic panels, IBM Plex fonts, Bento grid telemetry, minimal dot markers with pulse animations, pill-shaped filters. All functionality identical to iteration_39. Mobile responsive with bottom sheet. 3 test vehicles with different statuses. Auto-refresh every 8 seconds.

mocked_api.note: All endpoints use real MongoDB. No mocking.
